title: BiomeSpy
description: Rewrites search algorithm for /locate and Nature Compass — 97% less time costs.
body:
Tired of waiting for /locate biome or Nature Compass to finish scanning or even crashing the server?

**Biome Spy** rewrites the biome-search algorithm, reducing biome locate time by **up to 97%**, and reducing structure locate time by **up to 90%**

This mod assumes that five of the noise functions used during world generation are **height-independent**, allowing massive reductions in search computation without affecting accuracy(Still able to search cave biomes).

✅ Supports **TerraBlender** and **AlexsCaves** biomes  
🧭 Tested and verified on **All The Mods 10**  
⚡ No worldgen changes, no config needed — just pure speed.
